meaning: n.阿米莉娅(亦作 Amalia)(f.) n.[医]缺肢(畸形),无肢(畸形)
examples: The Young Amelia was first at the rendezvous.
These words showed that Amelia was suspicious.
Amelia Turner. Shortlisted for the Booker Prize last year.
Suppose your company had made the airplane that Amelia Earhart was flying when she disappeared.
Mia Gordon of Edinburgh Academy and Amelia Purkis, of Lilliesleaf Primary School in Melrose.
